_comment: Drop entries into the `testimonials` array to populate the homepage section. The site falls back to a graceful empty state when the array is empty. The `_template` field below documents the shape of an entry; it is ignored by the renderer.

_template.name: Person's display name
_template.quote: What they actually said. One to three sentences. No marketing voice. No invented quotes.
_template.initials: If no avatar, two-letter initials shown in the avatar circle. e.g. AK
_template.link: Optional URL — Discord invite, profile, server site
